installCommand: if [ -d frontend ]; then cd frontend; elif [ -d ../frontend ]; then cd ../frontend; else echo 'frontend not found' && exit 1; fi && npm install
buildCommand: if [ -d frontend ]; then cd frontend; elif [ -d ../frontend ]; then cd ../frontend; else echo 'frontend not found' && exit 1; fi && npm run build
devCommand: if [ -d frontend ]; then cd frontend; elif [ -d ../frontend ]; then cd ../frontend; else echo 'frontend not found' && exit 1; fi && npm run dev
